{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Uncrowned ceremony
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Uncrowned ceremony]] was joined by [[Sages]] standing behind their chosen pupils.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
